findings.evidence: Lines 52-64 already prove `(_root_.FundamentalGroup.map f a₀).range ≤ H` for arbitrary `H`; lines 68-84 only instantiate that theorem with `(_root_.FundamentalGroup.mapOfEq p he).range`.
findings.fix: Remove these two wrappers and use `map_range_le_of_subsingleton f (FundamentalGroup.mapOfEq p he).range` or `map_range_le_of_simplyConnectedSpace f a₀ (FundamentalGroup.mapOfEq p he).range` at call sites.
findings.issue: `map_range_le_mapOfEq_range_of_subsingleton` and `map_range_le_mapOfEq_range_of_simplyConnectedSpace` specialize the already-general target subgroup theorem to `(FundamentalGroup.mapOfEq p he).range`, so the extra `p`, `e₀`, and `he` parameters are a lower-level duplicate of the nearby API.

summary: The new fundamental-group API proves the natural subgroup theorem, but still exports two `mapOfEq`-range special cases whose extra covering-lift parameters add no mathematical generality.
